Class BaseTeacher

java.lang.Object
logic.entity.BaseTeacher
All Implemented Interfaces:
Moveable
Direct Known Subclasses:
AngryTeacher, NormalTeacher, SleepyTeacher
public class BaseTeacher extends Object implements Moveable
